title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Park Avenue Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Park Avenue Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Park Avenue Global Group! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Park Avenue Global Group:
Park Avenue Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue Global Group!
